sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array (id INTEGER, values LIST<INTEGER>);
INSERT INTO test_array (id, values) VALUES (1, [1, 1, NULL, -3, 1, 5]);
SELECT array_unique(values) AS unique_values FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_array SET values = array_unique(values) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, array_unique(values) AS unique_values FROM test_array GROUP BY id;
